executionArgs.additionalInstruction: Test each API integration separately: Postlight Parser, SerpApi, Wikidata SPARQL, DuckDuckGo, and OpenRouter. Use a real CNN article URL like https://edition.cnn.com/2025/09/16/politics/trump-russia-ukraine-war-reagan-uk-visit-analysis for end-to-end tests. Identify which specific integrations fail and what error they return.
